jobs.title: Backend Software Engineer
jobs.description: Build APIs with Python and FastAPI. Work with PostgreSQL, Redis, and Docker. Experience with AWS is a plus.

jobs.title: Frontend Engineer
jobs.description: Develop user interfaces using React, TypeScript, and Next.js. Collaborate with design and product.

jobs.title: Machine Learning Engineer
jobs.description: Train and deploy models with PyTorch. Build data pipelines in Python. Familiarity with Kubernetes and MLOps is helpful.

jobs.title: Data Scientist
jobs.description: Analyze datasets with pandas, NumPy, and scikit-learn. Build forecasting and classification models and communicate insights.

jobs.title: DevOps Engineer
jobs.description: Own CI/CD, infrastructure as code with Terraform, and container orchestration with Kubernetes. Experience with AWS required.
